title: carelia
intro: Carelia plant, also known as Carelia rosea, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayas, characterized by its pink or white flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, the Carelia plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a stimulant and expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of the Carelia plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Herbal preparations of the Carelia plant are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health issues.
